Great place for snacks and desserts.  We got a number of things - cookies, macarons, and other pastry.  It was all very very good.

Bijan Bakery has been a trusted name in San Jose for years, consistently delivering high-quality pastries and cakes. Their dedication to excellence shines through in every order, including the custom cakes they’ve provided for my family’s dental office. The flavors are rich, the presentation is elegant, and the service is always reliable. Whether it’s a special occasion or a casual treat, Bijan Bakery continues to impress with its craftsmanship and consistency.
